title: EP 22 | Rebuilding Momentum in 2026: The Canadian Prime Minister’s Visit to India
description: As India and Canada move toward stabilising a relationship that witnessed diplomatic strain in recent years, the proposed 2026 visit of the Canadian Prime Minister marks a critical moment in bilateral recalibration.
